summary: Vertical video. White House clip of a Trump TrumpRx.gov speech with caption cards, a headline overlay reading 'We Now Pay The Lowest Price Paid For Anybody in Any Country', subtitles, and a 'TEXT POTUS TO 45470' banner. It is a speech excerpt with on-screen graphics and no music.
notable_text: President Trump on TrumpRX; "We Now Pay The Lowest Price Paid For Anybody in Any Country"; TEXT "POTUS" TO 45470 FOR UPDATES FROM THE WHITE HOUSE; The WHITE HOUSE
